response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume demonstrates strong software engineering experience, particularly in full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and high-performance systems. However, his background lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, and deep neural network workload analysis, which are core to the Principal Performance Architect role. His education and prior roles do not align closely with the required technical qualifications, such as SIMD/MIMD architecture, GPU workload optimization, or hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with experience in high-performance systems and AI-agent infrastructure
Proven ability to work across the full stack and contribute to complex systems
Demonstrated expertise in optimization and performance engineering in prior roles
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware optimization
Lacks background in deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU architecture
Does not meet the educational requirements (no PhD, limited years of technical experience for the role's seniority)
